CommunityApplications.Profile:
OKiU Network Europe maintains EasyPXE for Unraid, a self-hosted PXE boot environment using dnsmasq, nginx, iPXE, and netboot.xyz.
EasyPXE provides proxyDHCP, TFTP, and HTTP boot services for Legacy BIOS and UEFI systems while continuing to use the existing router as the primary DHCP server.
Source code, installation instructions, issue reporting, and support are available through the EasyPXE-Unraid GitHub repository.
